inputs.label: Square Miles
inputs.businessContext: Area in square miles to convert.

businessContext_i18n.en: Area in square miles to convert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface en milles carrés à convertir.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Override standard conversion factor if needed (international definition: 1 mile = 1.609344 km, so 1 sq mi = (1.609344)^2 = 2.589988110336 km²).

businessContext_i18n.en: Override standard conversion factor if needed (international definition: 1 mile = 1.609344 km, so 1 sq mi = (1.609344)^2 = 2.589988110336 km²).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerekirse standart dönüşüm faktörünü geçersiz kılın (uluslararası tanım: 1 mil = 1.609344 km, yani 1 sq mi = (1.609344)^2 = 2.589988110336 km²).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Umrechnungsfaktor überschreiben, falls erforderlich (internationale Definition: 1 Meile = 1,609344 km, also 1 sq mi = (1,609344)^2 = 2,589988110336 km²).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Remplacez le facteur de conversion standard si nécessaire (définition internationale : 1 mile = 1,609344 km, donc 1 sq mi = (1,609344)^2 = 2,589988110336 km²).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output (0-10).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output (0-10).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe (0-10).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour la sortie (0-10).

inputs.label: Scaling Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for areas in terms of scaling (e.g., if input is in thousands of sq mi, use 1000).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for areas in terms of scaling (e.g., if input is in thousands of sq mi, use 1000).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alanlar için ölçekleme çarpanı (örneğin, girdi binlerce sq mi ise 1000 kullanın).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für Flächen in Bezug auf Skalierung (z. B. wenn die Eingabe in Tausend Quadratmeilen erfolgt, verwenden Sie 1000).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour les surfaces en termes d'échelle (ex. : si l'entrée est en milliers de sq mi, utilisez 1000).

inputs.label: Calibration Constant
inputs.businessContext: Additive constant to account for systematic measurement bias (e.g., survey calibration offset).

businessContext_i18n.en: Additive constant to account for systematic measurement bias (e.g., survey calibration offset).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sistematik ölçüm yanlılığını hesaba katmak için eklenen sabit (örneğin, anket kalibrasyon ofseti).
businessContext_i18n.de: Additive Konstante zur Berücksichtigung systematischer Messabweichungen (z. B. Vermessungskalibrierungs-Offset).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante additive pour tenir compte du biais de mesure systématique (par exemple, décalage d'étalonnage d'enquête).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
